message:
fix(node): saturating_add for counters in repair_controller and zk_attestation

Replace 7 plain += with saturating_add to prevent integer overflow:
- repair_controller: units_used and total_used accumulators (4 sites)
- zk_attestation: batch passed/failed counters and compliance report increment (3 sites)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
